zh.lifeSummary: 當George Clingan於1720年出生在愛爾蘭武爾斯特時，他的父親Michael Clingan22歲，母親Elizabeth Margaret McLean21歲。他於大約1749年與Margaret Jane Kirkpatrick在美國賓夕法尼亞州結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1778年4月8日在美國賓夕法尼亞州約克享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Clingan于1720年出生在爱尔兰武爾斯特时，他的父亲Michael Clingan22岁，母亲Elizabeth Margaret McLean21岁。他于大约1749年与Margaret Jane Kirkpatrick在美国宾夕法尼亚州结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1778年4月8日在美国宾夕法尼亚州約克享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clingan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Kirkcudbrightshire) and Irish (Fermanagh, Down): shortened form of Mac Clingan, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gilla Fhinnéin ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Finnian’, also Anglicized as Mac Alingen.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1749: York, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Pennsylvania, United States
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia on July 4, 1776. The liberty bell was first rung here to Celebrate this important document.

en.lifeSummary: When George Clingan was born in 1720, in Ulster, Ireland, his father, Michael Clingan, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Margaret McLean, was 21. He married Margaret Jane Kirkpatrick about 1749, in Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 8 April 1778, in York, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Clingan est né en 1720, à Ulster, Irlande, son père, Michael Clingan, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Margaret McLean, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Jane Kirkpatrick environ 1749, à Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1778, à York, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.York, York, Pennsylvania, British Coloni: York, York, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als George Clingan 1720 in Ulster, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Michael Clingan 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Margaret McLean 21. Er hat um 1749 in Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Margaret Jane Kirkpatrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 8. April 1778 im Alter von 58 Jahren in York, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Clingan è nato il nel 1720 nel Ulster, Irlanda, il suo padre, Michael Clingan, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Margaret McLean, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Jane Kirkpatrick circa 1749, nel Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 8 aprile 1778, nel York, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: George Clinganが1720年にアイルランドウルスターで生まれた時，父Michael Clinganは22歳，母Elizabeth Margaret McLeanは21歳であった。約1749年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州でMargaret Jane Kirkpatrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1778年4月8日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ヨークで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: George Clingan(이)가 1720년 아일랜드 울스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Michael Clingan(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Margaret McLean(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1749년 미국 펜실베이니아 주에서 Margaret Jane Kirkpatrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1778년 4월 8일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 요르크에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Clingan nasceu em 1720, em Ulster, Irlanda, seu pai, Michael Clingan, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Margaret McLean, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Jane Kirkpatrick aproximadamente 1749, em Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1778, em York, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Clingan родился в 1720 г. в местности улстир, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Michael Clingan было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Margaret McLean, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Jane Kirkpatrick около 1749 г. в местности Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 8 апреля 1778 г. в местности ерк, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 58 лет.
